title: Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates:
Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates!
